title: EvalRunEnvelope
description: Cross-harness eval run record for CI/CD, APIs, and databases. Not vendor stream-json or OTLP.

__schema0.description: EvalRunEnvelope schema version. Bump on breaking JSON changes.

__schema1.description: Unique identifier for this eval run (UUID).

__schema2.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started.

__schema3.description: Total wall time for the run in milliseconds.

__schema4.description: Reference to the suite YAML that defined this run.

SuiteReference.title: SuiteReference
SuiteReference.description: Link to the eval suite specification that produced this run.

__schema5.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the suite YAML that produced this run.

__schema7.description: Stable suite identifier when known (e.g. bundle or catalog name).

__schema9.description: Hash of suite file contents (SHA-256 hex) for reproducibility.

__schema11.description: Harness adapter that executed the run.

__schema12.description: Harness adapter id from suite YAML, e.g. claude-code.

__schema13.description: harness-eval package version when the envelope was built.

__schema15.description: Optional harness CLI version string (e.g. claude -v output).

HarnessInfo.title: HarnessInfo
HarnessInfo.description: Harness adapter and version metadata for the run.

__schema17.description: CI, git, and runtime provenance for correlation.

EvalProvenance.title: EvalProvenance
EvalProvenance.description: CI, git, and runtime provenance for DB correlation. Additional keys allowed.

__schema18.description: Optional duplicate of envelope runId for nested provenance blobs.

__schema20.description: CI metadata when run from a pipeline.

CiProvenance.title: CiProvenance
CiProvenance.description: CI job metadata for correlating eval runs with pipelines.

__schema21.description: CI provider name, e.g. github-actions or gitlab-ci.

__schema27.description: URL to the CI job run page.

__schema29.description: Git metadata when run from a repo.

GitProvenance.title: GitProvenance
GitProvenance.description: Git coordinates for the code under evaluation.

__schema30.description: Git commit SHA at time of run.

__schema34.description: Repository slug or URL, e.g. alis-build/harness-eval-ts.

__schema36.description: Version of the plugin or MCP bundle under test.

__schema38.description: Actor or trigger source, e.g. user id, schedule, or pull_request.

__schema41.description: Aggregate behavioral and outcome pass summary.

__schema42.description: Number of matrix cells (case × config) in this run.

__schema43.description: Cells that passed all behavioral assertion thresholds.

__schema44.description: True when every cell passed behavioral assertion thresholds.

__schema45.description: True when every graded cell passed all outcome expectations. Omitted if not graded.

EvalRunSummary.title: EvalRunSummary
EvalRunSummary.description: Aggregate pass/fail summary for CI gates and dashboards.

__schema47.description: Results for each test case × matrix cell.

EvalCellResult.title: EvalCellResult
EvalCellResult.description: Result for one test case × matrix cell combination.

__schema48.description: Test case id from the suite YAML.

__schema51.description: Author notes copied from the suite.

__schema53.description: Prompt sent to the harness for this case.

__schema57.description: Reference trajectory in Vertex protojson wire format.

__schema58.description: Ordered tool calls in the trajectory.

ProtojsonToolCall.title: ProtojsonToolCall
ProtojsonToolCall.description: Tool call in Vertex EvaluationService wire format.

__schema59.description: Tool name as emitted by the agent.

__schema61.description: Human ratings keyed by metric name for judge calibration.

__schema63.description: Matrix cell label, e.g. sonnet or opus-marketplace.

__schema64.description: Matrix axis values for this cell (model, plugin source, etc.).

__schema66.description: Per-assertion pass rates across repetitions in this cell.

EvalAssertionStat.title: EvalAssertionStat
EvalAssertionStat.description: Behavioral assertion statistics for one assertion in a matrix cell.

__schema68.description: Minimum pass rate required across repetitions (0..1).

__schema70.description: Repetitions included in the denominator (excludes adapter errors).

__schema72.description: Whether passRate meets or exceeds threshold.

__schema73.description: Repetitions excluded from assertion denominators due to harness failure.

__schema74.description: Cell passed all behavioral assertion thresholds.

__schema75.description: Cell passed all outcome expectations when graded. Omitted if not graded.

__schema77.description: Individual harness runs for statistical eval.

EvalRepetition.title: EvalRepetition
EvalRepetition.description: One harness invocation — the unit external judges and trajectory queries use.

__schema78.description: Zero-based index of this repetition within the cell.

__schema79.description: Wall time for this repetition in milliseconds.

__schema80.description: Normalized harness session when the run completed with a view.

TrajectoryViewExport.title: TrajectoryViewExport
TrajectoryViewExport.description: TrajectoryView with schemaVersion, as embedded in EvalRunEnvelope repetitions.

__schema82.description: Harness-assigned session identifier from the vendor stream.

__schema83.description: Model identifier used for the session, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6.

__schema84.description: Working directory the harness used for the run.

__schema85.description: Permission mode active for the session, when reported by the harness.

__schema87.description: Tool names the harness reported as available at session start.

__schema89.description: MCP servers configured for the session, with connection status.

McpServer.title: McpServer
McpServer.description: MCP server entry from session initialization metadata.

__schema90.description: MCP server name as reported by the harness.

__schema91.description: Connection status at session start, e.g. connected or failed.

SessionMeta.title: SessionMeta
SessionMeta.description: Session metadata captured from harness initialization (e.g. Claude system/init).

__schema92.description: Every tool call in global emission order.

ToolCall.title: ToolCall
ToolCall.description: One tool invocation in emission order. Primary unit for behavioral assertions.

__schema93.description: Fully-qualified tool name, e.g. mcp__plugin_alis-build_api__SearchSkills or Bash.

__schema94.description: Namespace prefix for MCP-style names (mcp__<server>), or null for built-in tools.

__schema96.description: Vendor tool-use block id; matches a later tool_result.tool_use_id when present.

__schema97.description: Arguments the model emitted for this tool call. Tool-specific schema.

__schema98.description: Tool result payload, or null if no result was observed (e.g. process killed).

__schema100.description: Whether the tool reported an error in its result envelope.

__schema101.description: Assistant turn that produced this call. Parallel calls in one message share a turnIndex.

__schema102.description: Index in the global ordered tool-call sequence (used for called_before assertions).

__schema103.description: Assistant turns with per-turn text and tool calls.

AssistantTurn.title: AssistantTurn
AssistantTurn.description: One assistant turn: text content plus any tool calls in that turn.

__schema105.description: Assistant text emitted in this turn (may be empty for tool-only turns).

__schema106.description: Tool calls emitted in this turn, in block order.

__schema107.description: Model stop reason for this turn, or null if not reported.

__schema109.description: All assistant text concatenated across turns. Used for response_contains assertions.

__schema110.description: Stop reason of the last assistant turn.

__schema112.description: Aggregate usage and cost for the session.

__schema113.description: Total input tokens for the session.

__schema114.description: Total output tokens for the session.

__schema115.description: Total session cost in USD when reported by the harness.

__schema116.description: Session duration in milliseconds from harness result metadata.

__schema117.description: Number of assistant turns in the session.

UsageSummary.title: UsageSummary
UsageSummary.description: Aggregate token usage, cost, and timing from the harness result.

__schema118.description: Retry events observed during the run.

RetryRecord.title: RetryRecord
RetryRecord.description: Rate-limit or transient error retry observed during the run.

__schema119.description: Approximate milliseconds since session start when the retry was observed.

__schema120.description: Raw vendor payload from the retry event (e.g. system/api_retry).

__schema121.description: Whether the harness result envelope indicated success.

__schema122.description: TrajectoryView schema version for storage and API interchange.

__schema123.description: Adapter process diagnostics for this repetition.

AdapterDiagnostics.title: AdapterDiagnostics
AdapterDiagnostics.description: Process-level diagnostics from the harness adapter.

__schema124.description: Child process exit code, or null if not available.

__schema126.description: Human-readable label for a non-zero harness exit code when the adapter provides one.

__schema128.description: Termination signal when the harness process was signaled.

__schema130.description: Captured stderr from the harness process.

__schema132.description: Parse errors from adapter output handling.

ParseErrorRecord.title: ParseErrorRecord
ParseErrorRecord.description: One stream-json or adapter output parse failure.

__schema134.description: Raw line from harness output that failed to parse.

__schema136.description: Whether the harness run hit the configured timeout.

__schema140.description: Deterministic behavioral assertion results for this repetition.

AssertionResult.title: AssertionResult
AssertionResult.description: Result of evaluating one assertion, optionally with child nodes.

__schema144.description: Diagnostic detail explaining pass or fail.

__schema145.description: Tool calls that satisfied (or could have satisfied) this assertion.

__schema149.description: LLM or custom judge outcome grades when grading was run.

OutcomeGrades.title: OutcomeGrades
OutcomeGrades.description: Outcome grades for one repetition from the built-in or external LLM judge.

__schema151.description: Stable judge identifier, e.g. harness-eval/claude-grader or langsmith/my-judge.

__schema152.description: Model used by the judge, when applicable.

JudgeInfo.title: JudgeInfo
JudgeInfo.description: Identity of the judge that produced outcome grades.

GradedExpectation.title: GradedExpectation
GradedExpectation.description: Outcome grade for one natural-language expectation.

__schema158.description: Whether the judge deemed this expectation satisfied.

__schema159.description: Judge explanation citing transcript or trajectory evidence.

GradingSummary.title: GradingSummary
GradingSummary.description: Aggregate counts for a set of graded expectations.

__schema165.description: Optional structured feedback for suite authors.

EvalFeedback.title: EvalFeedback
EvalFeedback.description: Structured eval feedback from the outcome judge.

__schema166.description: Per-item suggestions for improving the suite or expectations.

__schema167.description: Related assertion or expectation text, when the suggestion targets one.

__schema169.description: Why the judge suggests changing the suite or assertions.

__schema170.description: Overall narrative feedback from the judge.

__schema171.description: Error message when grading failed for this repetition.

__schema173.description: Scores from external eval frameworks (LangSmith, Braintrust, etc.).

ExternalScore.title: ExternalScore
ExternalScore.description: Score attached from an external eval platform without replacing OutcomeGrades.

__schema175.description: External framework identifier, e.g. langsmith or braintrust.

__schema176.description: Metric name within the external framework.

__schema177.description: Metric value (numeric score, boolean pass, or categorical label).

__schema181.description: Framework-specific metadata (run ids, trace urls, etc.).

__schema183.description: Optional transcript, raw stream, or OTLP URI artifacts.

EvalArtifacts.title: EvalArtifacts
EvalArtifacts.description: Optional large or vendor-specific blobs. Store by reference in DB when possible.

__schema184.description: Claude Code stream-json lines — debug only, not cross-harness. Prefer transcript for judges.

__schema186.description: URI to an OTLP trace blob (S3, GCS, etc.) when exported separately.

EvaluationInstanceJson.title: EvaluationInstanceJson
EvaluationInstanceJson.description: Vertex EvaluationInstance wire format (agentEvalData omitted in v1).

__schema196.description: Vertex Trajectory*Instance protojson wire objects keyed by metric.

TrajectoryInstancesJson.title: TrajectoryInstancesJson
TrajectoryInstancesJson.description: Vertex Trajectory*Instance messages keyed by metric.

__schema215.description: 1 when the harness run failed, 0 on success.

__schema217.description: Present when the harness failed without producing a trajectory.

RepetitionError.title: RepetitionError
RepetitionError.description: Harness failure for one repetition without a usable TrajectoryView.

__schema218.description: Harness failure message for this repetition.

__schema219.description: Adapter diagnostics when the harness failed before producing a trajectory.
